title: Multi-Factor Authentication Setup Wizard

statement.markdown:
## Projects Challenge: Multi-Factor Authentication Setup Wizard

Your objective is to build a fully functional, highly interactive React component representing the target design mockup.

### 🎨 Color Palette
* `#B7D7CD`
* `#C06C88`
* `#411C56`

### 📐 Target Design Mockup
Use the visual mockup shown in the panel to guide your coordinate alignment, container proportions, and spacing.

### 📌 Target Design SVG Source
The target geometry is defined by the following SVG vector graphic (viewable by the LLM judge):
```xml
<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='400' height='300'>
<g transform='translate(60,50)'>
<rect x='0' y='0' width='280' height='200' rx='10' fill='#B7D7CD'/>
<text x='20' y='20' fill='#C06C88' font-size='24' font-family='Arial'>Multi-Factor Auth Setup</text>
<rect x='20' y='60' width='240' height='40' rx='5' fill='#C06C88'/>
<text x='30' y='80' fill='#411C56' font-size='18' font-family='Arial'>Available Methods</text>
<circle cx='120' cy='100' r='20' fill='#C06C88'/>
<circle cx='220' y='100' r='20' fill='#C06C88'/>
<g transform='translate(140,110)'>
<rect x='0' y='0' width='80' height='30' rx='5' fill='#411C56'/>
<text x='10' y='10' fill='#C06C88' font-size='16' font-family='Arial'>SMS</text>
</g>
<g transform='translate(240,110)'>
<rect x='0' y='0' width='80' height='30' rx='5' fill='#411C56'/>
<text x='10' y='10' fill='#C06C88' font-size='16' font-family='Arial'>Email</text>
</g>
</g>
</svg>
```

### ⚙️ Requirements
1. Match the visual presentation (layout, alignment, borders, colors) of the mockup.
2. Implement all necessary React state variables, event handlers, and input bindings to make the page interactive.
3. Make sure all interactive controls (buttons, forms, checkboxes, sliders) update the view correctly.

constraints: Must be fully interactive with state updates
Must include a form to input user's secret keys and display a summary of their selected methods

referenceAssets.caption: Recreate target design: Multi-Factor Authentication Setup Wizard

gradingCriteria.description: Evaluate how closely the layout matches the target visual mockup.
Verify interactive state updates, form logic, and handlers.
Review code cleanliness, proper semantic elements, and efficient state use.
